title: Writing: Shopping & Colors
description: Construct sentences describing what you want to buy using numbers and colors.

blocks.title: Translate to Japanese (Romaji)
blocks.instruction: Write these sentences in Romaji (or Hiragana if you can!):

items.source: That over there is a car.
Excuse me, how much is this?
items.answer: Sumimasen, kore wa ikura desu ka?

blocks.prompt:
Write a short shopping scenario in Japanese (Romaji). 
1. Say 'Excuse me' to the clerk.
2. Ask how much a specific color item is (e.g., 'How much is the red book?').
3. Say 'I will buy this' or 'This one please'.
4. Say 'Thank you'.
blocks.sampleAnswer:
Sumimasen! Kono akai hon wa ikura desu ka? Sanbyaku en desu. Jaa, kore wo kudasai. Arigatou gozaimasu!

(Excuse me! How much is this red book? It is 300 Yen. Well then, this one please. Thank you!)
